Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

Looks good. For some reason Linux has a strcnpy_from_user, but not strcncpy_to_user.

I've attached a patch in the bug ticket, to optimize a bit more the lookup or records. Could you consider whether it's worth merging?

Patch Set 6:

This does generate a lot of console spam however. The long paths cause cfs_trace_get_tage() to return NULL and then the CDEBUG()s are promoted to CERROR()s:

 
...
[498222.373800] cowardly refusing to write 4225 bytes in a page
[498222.374930] LustreError: 26946:0:(lmv_obd.c:734:lmv_fid2path()) lustre-MDT0000-mdc-ffff880077cac388: get path d154g.sanity/llapi_fid_test_name_
[498222.432354] cowardly refusing to write 4195 bytes in a page
[498222.433541] LustreError: 26954:0:(mdt_handler.c:5572:mdt_fid2path()) fid [0x200000007:0x1:0x0], path d154g.sanity/llapi_fid_test_name_
[498222.449920] cowardly refusing to write 4193 bytes in a page
[498222.451273] LustreError: 26946:0:(mdc_request.c:1669:mdc_ioc_fid2path()) path get [0x200000007:0x1:0x0] from 18446744073709551615 #0
[498222.451275] d154g.sanity/llapi_fid_test_name_
[498222.467574] cowardly refusing to write 4225 bytes in a page
[498222.468704] LustreError: 26946:0:(lmv_obd.c:734:lmv_fid2path()) lustre-MDT0000-mdc-ffff880077cac388: get path d154g.sanity/llapi_fid_test_name_

Please rebase the change locally and upload the rebased commit for review.

parents.subject: LU-5657 doc: allow the use of rst2man to build man pages

commit.subject: LU-4239 tests: test FID related APIs
commit.message:
LU-4239 tests: test FID related APIs

This adds a few stress tests to the user lustre API, related to FIDs.

Change-Id: I34144a8f4c446e55c6630d31cae6a133d61eb304
Signed-off-by: Frank Zago <fzago@cray.com>
Test-Parameters: alwaysuploadlogs envdefinitions=ONLY=154g testlist=sanity
Reviewed-on: http://review.whamcloud.com/12545
Tested-by: Jenkins
Tested-by: Maloo <hpdd-maloo@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: John L. Hammond <john.hammond@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Jian Yu <jian.yu@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <oleg.drokin@intel.com>
